vol_name: Mistakes, Overconfidence and the Effect of Sharing on Detecting Lies
vol_description: The dataset includes the videos of senders (that consented their videos to be shared on Databrary) in Experiments 1 and 3 of the paper titled "Mistakes, Overconfidence and the Effect of Sharing on Detecting Lies" by Serra-Garcia and Gneezy (2021, American Economic Review)
